snapshot.scope: Independent DeepSeek/provider-management review binds the governed owner documents and exact current Home/Pi, Provider/Secret, IPC, renderer, contract and focused-test bytes on base 37b4cd1.

reviewers.task: DeepSeek native completion, Provider credential lifecycle and truthful runtime-status review
reviewers.independence: The reviewer did not author the candidate and independently compared its exact implementation, contracts, tests and four owner-document edits before binding this snapshot.

dimensions.summary: Existing Models and Home owners carry credential replacement, Provider deletion, secret cleanup, default rebinding and native completion without adding a competing settings or Agent owner.

Code and four owner documents agree that only zero-tool, no-current-note Home auto turns may finish natively; tool-backed turns retain Host finish validation and Host-policy errors remain distinct from Provider call failure.
The candidate revises existing accepted decisions and owner contracts without changing any Requirement, Exit, Phase, acceptance-manifest or semantic-claim status.

Revision and active-reference fences, real generation probes, rollback/restart tests, body-free errors, session-only discovery/generation truth and focused UI regressions provide executable maintenance boundaries.
No new owner document was introduced; four existing owners were consolidated while all five documentation-leanness checks remain green.

verification.evidence: Seven focused files and 209 tests pass, including zero-tool completion, tool-backed finish, Host-versus-Provider errors, credential replacement/deletion, restart recovery and Models status truth.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: Contract checks CON-001 through CON-004, 93 decision records, all documentation checks and all five leanness dimensions pass on the current candidate.

verification.command: Independent exact-byte review of DeepSeek/provider-management candidate based on 37b4cd1
verification.evidence: Review confirms explicit Provider-call failure, preserved typed Host errors, binding repair, secret-safe revision/reference fencing, discovery/generation separation and no status promotion.

coordination.taskTitle: DeepSeek conversation and Provider management repair
coordination.compatibility: The candidate extends the existing Models IPC and Home completion boundary without changing vault schemas, release scope, Requirement status, Exit status or Phase status.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning synchronized four existing owners; this independent review binds their current bytes to the implementation and focused evidence without promoting delivery status.

nonBlockingRisks: Real saved-credential DeepSeek generation remains a separate macOS acceptance claim; this recipe records only independently rerun code, contract and documentation evidence.

Credential replacement and Provider deletion are destructive or secret-bearing actions and still require explicit user/native confirmation for final real-account acceptance; tests use synthetic credentials.
Provider discovery and generation health are intentionally session-local and reset after restart; Refresh never proves chat usability.
Unknown typed Host failures preserve their stable code but currently share one body-free Agent completion message until a dedicated localized repair surface is justified.
Windows/Linux provider-management qualification remains unclaimed; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted by this repair.
